name: cottontail
description: Tiny Zig-based JavaScript runtime scaffold for Electrobun.
author: Blackboard Technologies Inc.

scripts.check-zig-version: bun run setup && node scripts/zig.js version
scripts.build: bun run setup && node scripts/zig.js build
scripts.build:release: bun run setup && node scripts/zig.js build -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall
scripts.test:zig: bun run setup && node scripts/zig.js build test
scripts.test: bun run test:zig && bun run test:js
